action: Recover and classify divergence between the canonical queue snapshot and later additive Frontier queue-update artifacts without overwriting either history.

progress.resolution: Classified as temporal state divergence: later additive records supersede the canonical snapshot only for current Frontier inventory while preserving the canonical file as historical evidence.
progress.verification: All cited repository files were fetched by exact path; recent commit search corroborated the R-033 and R-034 implementation and evidence sequences.
progress.privacy_boundary: Only public repository files and commit metadata were used. No raw private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, account identifiers, or unreviewed uploads were persisted.

handoff: Implement a deterministic queue materializer that merges canonical and additive queue records by item identifier, preserves every source blob and timestamp, and emits explicit conflicts rather than silently overwriting state.
